overall.description: First-person exploration of a sunny Mediterranean-style coastal path in a video game. The player walks along an elevated stone promenade, descends stairs to a rocky shore, explores the water's edge while observing the sea and sun, and returns up the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated coastal promenade with stone balustrade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated stone pathway beside the sea

entered.detail: tall light-colored stone block wall running along the left side of the path
ornate black wrought iron fence with stone pillars separating the path from the cliff edge
wide stone staircase descending to the lower shore level
square stone pillars supporting the metal fence along the cliff edge
single leafy tree growing on the rocky outcrop ahead
rocky island formation visible in the sea on the horizon
calm blue sea visible beyond the fence on the right
stone tile pavement with circular pattern underfoot

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny elevated coastal walkway with a high stone wall on the left and an ornate metal fence on the right overlooking the sea. The camera moves forward along the paved path toward a descending staircase, with a lone tree visible on the rocky point ahead.

events.description: begins descending the wide stone stairs toward the lower shore level

agents.ego_description: carefully walking down the stone stairs with metal railing on the right

entered.detail: large weathered rock outcrops and boulders on the lower shore level

segments.scene_description: The camera turns and descends the stone staircase, leaving the upper promenade behind. The metal fence continues alongside the steps, and large coastal rock formations come into view at the bottom of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal shoreline at sea level

agents.ego_description: walking along the uneven rocky terrain near the water's edge, exploring the shoreline

entered.detail: uneven dirt and rocky ground at sea level with scattered small stones

segments.scene_description: Now at sea level, the camera explores the open rocky shoreline with the stone retaining wall now on the right and the expansive sea ahead. Large rock formations line the coast as the camera moves forward over the uneven terrain toward the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal rocks at water's edge with panoramic sea views

events.description: camera pans upward to reveal the bright sun high in the blue sky
pans left to reveal the lighthouse tower on the upper cliff and the coastline

agents.ego_description: approaching the water's edge and panning to observe the sea, sun, and distant lighthouse

entered.detail: red and white striped tower structure visible atop the cliff in the distance
bright sun visible in the blue sky creating lens flare effects

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the water's edge and pans around to take in the panoramic coastal views. The bright midday sun becomes visible in the sky, and panning left reveals a distinctive red and white lighthouse tower standing on the upper cliffs.

events.description: begins ascending the stone stairs to return to the upper promenade level

agents.ego_description: walking back along the shore and climbing up the stone stairs to the upper level

entered.detail: stone staircase leading back up to the elevated promenade
wrought iron fence continuing alongside the ascending stairs
stone pillars marking the stairway entrance
stone tile pavement at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera turns back from the shore and approaches the stone stairs, with the retaining wall now on the left. The camera ascends the stairs, returning to the upper promenade level where the paved walkway and metal fence reappear.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunny elevated promenade down to a rocky shoreline and back again. It begins by moving forward along a paved coastal walkway bordered by a high stone wall and an ornate metal fence before turning to descend a stone staircase. As the camera reaches sea level, the scene opens into an expansive rocky shoreline where the retaining wall shifts to the right and the terrain becomes uneven. The camera then reaches the water's edge to pan across the panoramic coast, revealing the bright midday sun and a red and white lighthouse tower perched on the distant cliffs. Finally, the perspective turns away from the sea to approach the stairs once more, ascending back to the upper promenade where the paved path and metal fence reappear.
